title: Joining the School Basketball Team Tryouts

all.en: Brandon laced up his new sneakers in the locker room before the tryouts began.
all.zh: 布蘭登在選拔開始前在更衣室繫好他的新球鞋鞋帶。

all.en: He had been practicing his shooting in the park every evening for the past month.
all.zh: 過去一個月來，他每天傍晚都在公園練習投籃。

all.en: Coach Lin blew the whistle and called all the hopeful players onto the court.
all.zh: 林教練吹響哨子，把所有滿懷希望的球員叫到場上。

all.en: More than thirty boys lined up nervously, knowing only twelve spots were available.
all.zh: 超過三十名男孩緊張地排成一列，他們知道只有十二個名額。

all.en: The first drill required them to dribble through cones at full speed.
all.zh: 第一項訓練要求他們全速運球穿越三角錐。

all.en: Brandon performed well, but he stumbled slightly during the final lap of the exercise.
all.zh: 布蘭登表現不錯，但在練習的最後一圈他稍微踉蹌了一下。

all.en: Next, the coach paired them up for a one-on-one defensive challenge.
all.zh: 接著，教練將他們兩人一組進行一對一的防守挑戰。

all.en: His opponent was taller and stronger, but Brandon refused to give up easily.
all.zh: 他的對手比他更高更壯，但布蘭登拒絕輕易放棄。

all.en: He managed to steal the ball twice and even scored a clean jump shot.
all.zh: 他成功搶斷了兩次球，甚至投進了一記乾淨的跳投。

all.en: When the tryouts ended, the coach told him to come back tomorrow for the final round.
all.zh: 當選拔結束時，教練告訴他明天回來參加最後一輪。

all.en: Brandon walked home exhausted but proud, dreaming of wearing the team jersey soon.
all.zh: 布蘭登筋疲力盡卻自豪地走回家，夢想著很快能穿上球隊的球衣。

all.en: That night, Brandon stretched his sore muscles carefully and went to bed earlier than usual.
all.zh: 那天晚上，布蘭登小心地伸展痠痛的肌肉，比平常更早就寢。

all.en: His older brother gave him useful advice about staying calm under heavy pressure.
all.zh: 他的哥哥給了他關於在重壓下保持冷靜的實用建議。

all.en: The next afternoon, only fifteen players remained for the final round of the tryouts.
all.zh: 隔天下午，只有十五名球員留下來參加最後一輪選拔。

all.en: Coach Lin divided them into two teams for a serious full-court practice match.
all.zh: 林教練把他們分成兩隊，進行一場正式的全場練習賽。

all.en: Brandon ran hard, passed accurately, and communicated well with his new teammates.
all.zh: 布蘭登跑得很拼命，傳球精準，並與新隊友溝通良好。

all.en: In the second half, he made a critical assist that led to an easy basket.
all.zh: 在下半場，他做出了一個關鍵助攻，促成了一次輕鬆得分。

all.en: The coach watched silently from the sideline, jotting notes on a small clipboard.
all.zh: 教練在邊線安靜地觀察著，在小寫字板上記筆記。

all.en: When the match ended, the players gathered around Coach Lin with anxious expressions.
all.zh: 比賽結束時，球員們神情緊張地圍著林教練。

all.en: He read out the final twelve names slowly, and Brandon's name was on the list.
all.zh: 他緩慢地念出最後十二人的名單，布蘭登的名字就在上面。

all.en: Brandon called his parents immediately, struggling to speak through his happy tears.
all.zh: 布蘭登立刻打電話給父母，激動到幾乎說不出話來。
